description: Policy for comparison-page selection. A comparison page must help a buyer choose between tools for the same job, not force unrelated AI products into a fake versus page.
default_rule: Auto-select only pairs that share the same primary category. Primary-secondary overlap, secondary-secondary overlap, and broad tier-one cross-category pairs are review-only unless explicitly allowed here.

allowed_adjacent_pairs.reason: Image generation and design-suite buyers often choose where the finished creative asset should be made.
Both can sit in the app-building workflow, even though one starts from a prompt-to-app canvas and the other from an IDE.
Both compete for everyday writing improvement, drafting, and editing jobs.
Grok has a documented coding-agent lane, so this is a coding workflow decision when framed asymmetrically.
Both can answer source-backed research questions, with different depth and citation workflows.

blocked_pairs.reason: Descript is a transcript-first media editor. Grok is a general assistant, API, search, media, voice, and coding platform. The overlapping voice/media words do not create the same buyer job.
Broad assistant versus meeting capture and transcript archive.
Hosted general assistant versus self-hosted operator-owned agent runtime.
Post-meeting synthesis assistant versus live meeting bot and archive.
General assistant versus API-first search/research platform.
Speech generation and voice platform versus meeting transcription archive.
